summary: Tested CRM Leads features: 250 per page pagination, Staff Leads Distribution section, staff filter dropdown, Staff Portal refresh button, loading indicator, and mobile-friendly leads with Call Now button. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM Leads features fully tested. Admin CRM shows 250 leads per page, Staff Leads Distribution section with staff lead counts, and staff filter dropdown. Staff Portal has working Refresh button, loading indicator, and mobile-friendly lead cards with Call Now button.

admin_crm_250_per_page.details: Backend API returns per_page=250, frontend pagination shows correct count

admin_crm_staff_leads_distribution.details: Section visible with 'Unassigned (53)', 'New (1)', 'Test (0)', etc. buttons showing lead counts per staff

admin_crm_staff_filter_dropdown.details: Dropdown with 'All Staff', 'Unassigned' options. Filter buttons in distribution section also work

staff_portal_refresh_button.details: Refresh button visible in header and Leads section. Clears cache and fetches fresh data

staff_portal_loading_indicator.details: Loading indicator shown during refresh with 'Refreshing your leads...' message

staff_portal_mobile_call_now.details: Mobile view shows large 'Call Now' button, WhatsApp button, Update button with touch-friendly card layout

leads_pagination.response: Returns leads array with pagination object containing per_page=250

staff_accounts.response: Returns staff list with leads_assigned count for each staff member

rca_of_issue: N/A - All features working correctly as implemented
